revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Category see also|14th-century BC endings}} {{Navseasoncats}} [[Category:14th century BC|Beginnings]] [[Category:Beginnings by century]] [[Category:2nd millennium BC beginnings]]'
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q109698938)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=14th-century_BC_beginnings here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
